title: Create Stress Debug
description: A mod that allows you to debug create networks by drawing an outline through walls.
body: # Create Stress Debug This is a small mod that draws an outline around create contraptions through walls. To use the mod, hover over a powered network and hit **B**, you can change this keybind in the controls. There are also many options for changing how the outline is drawn in the config. ![A create contraption being seen on the other side of a tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67b1d11f161298fb22e0cb518a472a9063e7ebe3.png)
